notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Josh Smith out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Burger pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger homers (5) on a fly ball to left field. Corey Seager scores. Wyatt Langford scores.
